hypotheses.hypothesis: Combining the 'describe what you want' hook with specific time savings ('Describe Your App — Live in 5 Min') will outperform either pattern alone by >20% CTR
hypotheses.rationale: INS-013 shows 'describe' hook is 2.3x for non-tech. INS-015 shows time specificity +22% for devs. Untested combination for non-tech segment. META-004 confirms non-tech is highest-growth audience.
hypotheses.test_design: A/B: Control = 'Describe Your App. Watch It Get Built.' vs Treatment = 'Describe Your App — Live in 5 Min'

hypotheses.hypothesis: Combining 'free' messaging (INS-010) with 'learn to build' framing (INS-011) in a single social creative will yield >3x CTR vs generic India creative
hypotheses.rationale: Each pattern individually shows strong lifts. Never tested together. META-001 confirms geo-specific wins compound.
hypotheses.test_design: A/B: Control = 'Build Apps with AI — Free' vs Treatment = 'Learn to Build Real Apps — Free Forever'

hypotheses.hypothesis: Adding a guided 'build your first app' tutorial in the Day 0 email for India students will improve first-app-created rate from 0.8% to >2%
hypotheses.rationale: INS-017 shows India students sign up but don't activate (0.8% first-app rate). INS-005 shows specific templates 2.4x vs generic. Targeted onboarding for this leaky funnel stage.
hypotheses.test_design: A/B: Control = generic welcome email vs Treatment = 'Build a Todo App in 3 Minutes' step-by-step tutorial email

hypotheses.hypothesis: App Store screenshots showing a before/after (sketch → live app via canvas) will outperform current canvas-only screenshots by >10% install rate
hypotheses.rationale: INS-020 shows canvas screenshots +19% vs code. INS-007 shows before/after is 2.1x in social. Combining visual canvas + transformation narrative in ASO.
hypotheses.test_design: A/B: Control = current canvas screenshots vs Treatment = sketch-to-app transformation sequence

hypotheses.hypothesis: Shifting 30% of India paid search budget to paid social (where CPA is stable at $5.80 vs search CPA spike to $11.40) will reduce blended India CPA by >25% without reducing signup volume
hypotheses.rationale: INS-021 shows India search CPA spiked 58% from competitor entry. Social remains stable. Budget reallocation test.
hypotheses.test_design: Budget shift: 70% search / 30% social → 40% search / 60% social for 7 days

hypotheses.hypothesis: Adding GDPR-specific compliance messaging to EU enterprise headlines will outperform generic SOC 2 messaging by >15% CTR
hypotheses.rationale: INS-016 shows security qualifiers are the top driver in EU. But SOC 2 is a US standard — GDPR is what EU buyers actually care about. META-002 confirms outcome framing wins for enterprise.
hypotheses.test_design: A/B: Control = 'SOC 2 Compliant AI Development' vs Treatment = 'GDPR-Ready Team Development Platform'
